results.title: Anthropic Release Notes - May 2026 Latest Updates - Releasebot
results.description: We've launched Claude Platform on AWS, bringing the Claude API to Anthropic-managed infrastructure accessible through AWS, with AWS billing and IAM authentication. Access the full Messages API, Files API, Message Batches API, Claude Managed Agents, Agent Skills, code execution, and tool use through native AWS endpoints. Learn more in Claude Platform on AWS. Original source ... Claude releases the Claude Platform on AWS, bringing the full Claude API feature set to AWS customers with AWS authentication, billing, and commitment retirement.
